# LocalServices AE

> UAE's premier local services marketplace connecting residents with trusted providers across all 7 emirates.

## About
LocalServices AE is a B2C marketplace for home, professional, and lifestyle service bookings in the UAE.

## Core Services
- Home Maintenance & Repairs
- Cleaning & Sanitization  
- Electrical & Plumbing
- Moving & Relocation
- Beauty & Wellness
- Photography & Events
- Pest Control
- Car Services

## Coverage
All 7 UAE emirates: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, Umm Al Quwain

## API
Data available via REST API. Contact: hello@localservices.ae

## Key Pages
- [Home](http://localhost:3000)
- [Services](http://localhost:3000/services)
- [About](http://localhost:3000/about)
